vocabulary.example: 我之前从来没看过这种艺术形式。
vocabulary.translation: I had never seen this art form before.

vocabulary.example: 这位艺术家的风格独特，每一件作品都令人印象深刻。
vocabulary.translation: This artist's style is unique; every piece leaves a deep impression on the viewer.

vocabulary.example: 通过这次展览，观众对中国文化遗产有了更深的了解。
vocabulary.translation: Through this exhibition, the audience gained a deeper understanding of China's cultural heritage.

vocabulary.example: 这幅画值得慢慢欣赏，每一处细节都充满了艺术感。
vocabulary.translation: This painting is worth appreciating slowly; every detail is full of artistic feeling.

vocabulary.example: 他通过长期创作，逐渐形成了自己独特的艺术风格。
vocabulary.translation: Through sustained creative work, he gradually developed his own unique artistic style.

vocabulary.example: 他不但擅长传统绘画，而且在雕塑方面也很有才华。
vocabulary.translation: He is not only skilled in traditional painting but also very talented in sculpture.

vocabulary.example: 这位艺术家的风格独特，每一件作品都令人印象深刻。
vocabulary.translation: This artist's style is unique; every piece leaves a deep impression on the viewer.

vocabulary.example: 博物馆里的表演让游客感受到了传统文化的魅力。
vocabulary.translation: The performance in the museum allowed visitors to experience the charm of traditional culture.

vocabulary.example: 博物馆里的表演让游客感受到了传统文化的魅力。
vocabulary.translation: The performance in the museum allowed visitors to experience the charm of traditional culture.

vocabulary.example: 通过这次展览，观众对中国文化遗产有了更深的了解。
vocabulary.translation: Through this exhibition, the audience gained a deeper understanding of China's cultural heritage.

vocabulary.example: 民间艺术是人民智慧的结晶，值得我们好好传承。
vocabulary.translation: Folk art is the crystallisation of people's wisdom and is worth preserving well.

vocabulary.example: 他不但擅长传统绘画，而且在雕塑方面也很有才华。
vocabulary.translation: He is not only skilled in traditional painting but also very talented in sculpture.

vocabulary.english: To appreciate a work of art

vocabulary.pinyin: chuán tǒng wén huà yí chǎn

key_sentences.chinese: 这幅画值得慢慢欣赏，每一处细节都充满了艺术感。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè fú huà zhí de màn man xīn shǎng, měi yí chù xì jié dōu chōng mǎn le yì shù gǎn.
key_sentences.english: This painting is worth appreciating slowly; every detail is full of artistic feeling.

key_sentences.chinese: 他不但擅长传统绘画，而且在雕塑方面也很有才华。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā bú dàn shàn cháng chuán tǒng huì huà, ér qiě zài diāo sù fāng miàn yě hěn yǒu cái huá.
key_sentences.english: He is not only skilled in traditional painting but also very talented in sculpture.

key_sentences.chinese: 通过这次展览，观众对中国文化遗产有了更深的了解。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tōng guò zhè cì zhǎn lǎn, guān zhòng duì Zhōng guó wén huà yí chǎn yǒu le gèng shēn de liǎo jiě.
key_sentences.english: Through this exhibition, the audience gained a deeper understanding of China's cultural heritage.

key_sentences.chinese: 这位艺术家的风格独特，每一件作品都令人印象深刻。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè wèi yì shù jiā de fēng gé dú tè, měi yí jiàn zuò pǐn dōu lìng rén yìn xiàng shēn kè.
key_sentences.english: This artist's style is unique; every piece leaves a deep impression on the viewer.

key_sentences.chinese: 民间艺术是人民智慧的结晶，值得我们好好传承。
key_sentences.pinyin: Mín jiān yì shù shì rén mín zhì huì de jié jīng, zhí de wǒ men hǎo hǎo chuán chéng.
key_sentences.english: Folk art is the crystallisation of people's wisdom and is worth preserving well.

key_sentences.chinese: 博物馆里的表演让游客感受到了传统文化的魅力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bó wù guǎn lǐ de biǎo yǎn ràng yóu kè gǎn shòu dào le chuán tǒng wén huà de mèi lì.
key_sentences.english: The performance in the museum allowed visitors to experience the charm of traditional culture.

key_sentences.chinese: 参观博物馆展览是欣赏传统文化遗产的好方法。
key_sentences.pinyin: Cān guān bó wù guǎn zhǎn lǎn shì xīn shǎng chuán tǒng wén huà yí chǎn de hǎo fāng fǎ.
key_sentences.english: Visiting museum exhibitions is a good way to appreciate traditional cultural heritage.

key_sentences.chinese: 艺术家的创作风格体现在他每一件展出的作品中。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yì shù jiā de chuàng zuò fēng gé tǐ xiàn zài tā měi yī jiàn zhǎn chū de zuò pǐn zhōng.
key_sentences.english: The artist's creative style is reflected in every exhibited artwork of his.

key_sentences.chinese: 通过表演和展览，人们更好地了解了中国的文化遗产。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tōng guò biǎo yǎn hé zhǎn lǎn, rén men gèng hǎo de liǎo jiě le Zhōng guó de wén huà yí chǎn.
key_sentences.english: Through performances and exhibitions, people have gained a better understanding of China's cultural heritage.

grammar_points.title: 值得 — Worth doing
grammar_points.explanation: 值得 means 'to be worth' doing something. It is placed before a verb or verb phrase to indicate that an action deserves the effort. Structure: 值得 + verb (+ object). It can also be negated as 不值得. Example: 这本书值得读。(This book is worth reading.)

examples.chinese: 这座博物馆值得参观，里面有很多珍贵的文化遗产。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zuò bó wù guǎn zhí de cān guān, lǐ miàn yǒu hěn duō zhēn guì de wén huà yí chǎn.
examples.english: This museum is worth visiting; it contains many precious cultural heritage items.

examples.chinese: 他的作品风格独特，值得我们深入研究。
examples.pinyin: Tā de zuò pǐn fēng gé dú tè, zhí de wǒ men shēn rù yán jiū.
examples.english: His work has a unique style and is worth studying in depth.

exercises.question: 这次展览非常精彩，_____ 去看看。
Choose the sentence that uses 值得 correctly.
exercises.correct: 这位艺术家的作品值得欣赏。
options: 这位艺术家的作品值得欣赏。
值得欣赏这位艺术家的作品。
这位艺术家值得的作品欣赏。
欣赏这位值得艺术家的作品。
option_pinyin: Zhè wèi yì shù jiā de zuò pǐn zhí de xīn shǎng.
Zhí de xīn shǎng zhè wèi yì shù jiā de zuò pǐn.
Zhè wèi yì shù jiā zhí de de zuò pǐn xīn shǎng.
Xīn shǎng zhè wèi zhí de yì shù jiā de zuò pǐn.

exercises.question: 这件雕塑虽然简单，但 _____ 细细品味。
Which sentence uses 值得 correctly?
exercises.correct: 这部电影值得看，故事很感人。
options: 这部电影值得看，故事很感人。
这部电影看值得，故事很感人。
值得这部电影看，故事很感人。
这部值得电影看，故事很感人。

grammar_points.title: 不但…而且… — Not only… but also…
grammar_points.explanation: 不但…而且… links two clauses to show that the second quality or action adds to the first rather than contrasting it. It emphasises accumulation or progression. Structure: Subject + 不但 + clause 1 + 而且 + clause 2. Both clauses usually share the same subject. Example: 她不但会唱歌，而且会跳舞。(She can not only sing but also dance.)

examples.chinese: 这幅画不但色彩鲜艳，而且构图非常有创意。
examples.pinyin: Zhè fú huà bú dàn sè cǎi xiān yàn, ér qiě gòu tú fēi cháng yǒu chuàng yì.
examples.english: This painting is not only vivid in colour but also very creative in composition.

examples.chinese: 参观博物馆不但能增长知识，而且能欣赏到珍贵的文化遗产。
examples.pinyin: Cān guān bó wù guǎn bú dàn néng zēng zhǎng zhī shi, ér qiě néng xīn shǎng dào zhēn guì de wén huà yí chǎn.
examples.english: Visiting a museum not only broadens knowledge but also allows you to appreciate precious cultural heritage.

exercises.question: 她 _____ 喜欢民间艺术，_____ 自己也开始学习创作。
Choose the correct sentence using 不但…而且…
exercises.correct: 这位舞蹈家不但表演精彩，而且非常谦虚。
options: 这位舞蹈家不但表演精彩，而且非常谦虚。
这位舞蹈家不但表演精彩，但是非常谦虚。
而且这位舞蹈家表演精彩，不但非常谦虚。
这位舞蹈家表演精彩不但，非常谦虚而且。
option_pinyin: Zhè wèi wǔ dǎo jiā bú dàn biǎo yǎn jīng cǎi, ér qiě fēi cháng qiān xū.
Zhè wèi wǔ dǎo jiā bú dàn biǎo yǎn jīng cǎi, dàn shì fēi cháng qiān xū.
Ér qiě zhè wèi wǔ dǎo jiā biǎo yǎn jīng cǎi, bú dàn fēi cháng qiān xū.
Zhè wèi wǔ dǎo jiā biǎo yǎn jīng cǎi bú dàn, fēi cháng qiān xū ér qiě.

exercises.question: What does 不但…而且… express?
exercises.correct: Not only… but also… (adding more qualities)
options: Not only… but also… (adding more qualities)

exercises.question: 这个展览不但吸引了本地观众，_____ 还吸引了很多外国游客。
Which word correctly pairs with 不但 in the pattern 不但…_____…?

grammar_points.title: 通过 — Through; by means of
grammar_points.explanation: 通过 means 'through', 'by means of', or 'via'. It introduces the method, channel, or process by which something is achieved. Structure: 通过 + noun/verb phrase + (subject) + result. It can appear at the start of the sentence or after the subject. Example: 通过努力学习，他考上了大学。(Through hard study, he got into university.)

examples.chinese: 通过这次展览，我对中国传统艺术有了全新的认识。
examples.pinyin: Tōng guò zhè cì zhǎn lǎn, wǒ duì Zhōng guó chuán tǒng yì shù yǒu le quán xīn de rèn shi.
examples.english: Through this exhibition, I gained a completely new understanding of traditional Chinese art.

examples.chinese: 他通过长期创作，逐渐形成了自己独特的艺术风格。
examples.pinyin: Tā tōng guò cháng qī chuàng zuò, zhú jiàn xíng chéng le zì jǐ dú tè de yì shù fēng gé.
examples.english: Through sustained creative work, he gradually developed his own unique artistic style.

exercises.question: _____ 参观博物馆，我们了解了很多文化遗产的故事。
Choose the correct use of 通过.
exercises.correct: 通过这次合作，两国的文化交流更加密切了。
options: 通过这次合作，两国的文化交流更加密切了。
这次合作通过，两国的文化交流更加密切了。
两国通过，文化交流这次合作更加密切了。
文化交流通过密切，这次合作两国了。
option_pinyin: Tōng guò zhè cì hé zuò, liǎng guó de wén huà jiāo liú gèng jiā mì qiē le.
Zhè cì hé zuò tōng guò, liǎng guó de wén huà jiāo liú gèng jiā mì qiē le.
Liǎng guó tōng guò, wén huà jiāo liú zhè cì hé zuò gèng jiā mì qiē le.
Wén huà jiāo liú tōng guò mì qiē, zhè cì hé zuò liǎng guó le.

exercises.question: What does 通过 mean in 通过努力, he succeeded?
_____ 学习民间舞蹈，她深深爱上了中国传统文化。
Which sentence uses 通过 correctly?
exercises.correct: 他通过大量阅读，提高了语言能力。
options: 他通过大量阅读，提高了语言能力。
通过他大量阅读，提高了语言能力。
他大量阅读通过，提高了语言能力。
他通过提高了语言能力，大量阅读。

culture_notes.title: China's Intangible Cultural Heritage
culture_notes.content: China holds one of the richest collections of intangible cultural heritage (非物质文化遗产, fēi wù zhì wén huà yí chǎn) in the world. Recognised by UNESCO, China's entries include traditional arts such as Peking Opera (京剧, Jīng jù), shadow puppetry (皮影戏, pí yǐng xì), paper-cutting (剪纸, jiǎn zhǐ), and the intricate silk weaving of Suzhou (苏州丝绸, Sū zhōu sī chóu). These folk art forms have been passed down through generations and reflect the values, beliefs, and daily life of the Chinese people across centuries. The Chinese government actively promotes the protection and transmission of these traditions through national policies, museums, and community programmes. Visiting a local folk art workshop or an intangible heritage exhibition (非遗展览, fēi yí zhǎn lǎn) is one of the best ways for learners to connect with living Chinese culture.

idioms.english: A hundred flowers bloom — a flourishing of diverse arts and culture

quiz.question: What does 文化遗产 mean?
Which word means 'folk; among the people'?
Fill in the blank: 这幅画 _____ 慢慢欣赏，每一个细节都很精彩。
Fill in the blank: 他 _____ 擅长绘画，_____ 在音乐方面也很有才华。
Choose the sentence that uses 通过 correctly.
quiz.correct: 通过这次展览，我们了解了更多文化遗产。
options: 通过这次展览，我们了解了更多文化遗产。
这次展览通过，我们文化遗产了解了。
我们通过，这次展览文化遗产了解了。
文化遗产通过了解，我们这次展览了。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 艺术风格 mean?
Which phrase means 'to visit an exhibition'?
The idiom 百花齐放 refers to:
quiz.correct: A flourishing of diverse arts and culture
options: A flourishing of diverse arts and culture
A single flower blooming in winter

quiz.question: What does the phrase 民间艺术 mean?
Which grammar pattern means 'by means of; through'?
Fill in: 参观博物馆展览是欣赏传统文化 _____ 的好方法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 陈老师，这幅画的风格和其他作品很不一样，这是哪个时代的？
lines.pinyin: Chén lǎo shī, zhè fú huà de fēng gé hé qí tā zuò pǐn hěn bù yí yàng, zhè shì nǎ gè shí dài de?
lines.english: Mr Chen, this painting's style is very different from the other works. Which era is it from?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这是清代的一幅民间艺术作品，通过细腻的笔触展现了当时的生活风貌。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì Qīng dài de yì fú mín jiān yì shù zuò pǐn, tōng guò xì nì de bǐ chù zhǎn xiàn le dāng shí de shēng huó fēng mào.
lines.english: This is a folk art work from the Qing dynasty; through delicate brushstrokes it captures the lifestyle of that era.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 真的非常值得欣赏！那边的雕塑也是同一时期的吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de fēi cháng zhí de xīn shǎng! Nà biān de diāo sù yě shì tóng yì shí qī de ma?
lines.english: It's truly worth appreciating! Are the sculptures over there from the same period too?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那些雕塑不但历史悠久，而且是国家级文化遗产，非常珍贵。
lines.pinyin: Nà xiē diāo sù bú dàn lì shǐ yōu jiǔ, ér qiě shì guó jiā jí wén huà yí chǎn, fēi cháng zhēn guì.
lines.english: Those sculptures are not only ancient but are also national-level cultural heritage items — extremely precious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 博物馆这次的展览真的很精彩，吸引了好多人来参观。
lines.pinyin: Bó wù guǎn zhè cì de zhǎn lǎn zhēn de hěn jīng cǎi, xī yǐn le hǎo duō rén lái cān guān.
lines.english: This museum exhibition is really wonderful; it has attracted so many visitors.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，我们希望通过展览，让更多人了解和热爱传统文化。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ men xī wàng tōng guò zhǎn lǎn, ràng gèng duō rén liǎo jiě hé rè ài chuán tǒng wén huà.
lines.english: Yes, we hope that through the exhibition, more people will come to understand and love traditional culture.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 下次有新展览，我一定再来！谢谢您的讲解。
lines.pinyin: Xià cì yǒu xīn zhǎn lǎn, wǒ yí dìng zài lái! Xiè xie nín de jiǎng jiě.
lines.english: When there is a new exhibition next time, I will definitely come again! Thank you for your explanation.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 杨绛，昨晚的京剧表演太精彩了！我之前从来没看过这种艺术形式。
lines.pinyin: Yáng Jiàng, zuó wǎn de Jīng jù biǎo yǎn tài jīng cǎi le! Wǒ zhī qián cóng lái méi kàn guò zhè zhǒng yì shù xíng shì.
lines.english: Yang Jiang, last night's Peking Opera performance was amazing! I had never seen this art form before.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 京剧是中国传统文化的代表，不但有悠久的历史，而且影响了很多亚洲国家。
lines.pinyin: Jīng jù shì Zhōng guó chuán tǒng wén huà de dài biǎo, bú dàn yǒu yōu jiǔ de lì shǐ, ér qiě yǐng xiǎng le hěn duō Yà zhōu guó jiā.
lines.english: Peking Opera represents Chinese traditional culture; it not only has a long history but has also influenced many Asian countries.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 演员的妆容和服装风格真的很特别，他们都是怎么学习的？
lines.pinyin: Yǎn yuán de zhuāng róng hé fú zhuāng fēng gé zhēn de hěn tè bié, tā men dōu shì zěn me xué xí de?
lines.english: The performers' make-up and costume style are really special. How do they all learn?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 他们通过多年严格的专业训练，才能掌握这门艺术。
lines.pinyin: Tā men tōng guò duō nián yán gé de zhuān yè xùn liàn, cái néng zhǎng wò zhè mén yì shù.
lines.english: Through years of rigorous professional training, they are able to master this art form.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我觉得这种表演真的值得向全世界推广，太有魅力了！
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jué de zhè zhǒng biǎo yǎn zhēn de zhí de xiàng quán shì jiè tuī guǎng, tài yǒu mèi lì le!
lines.english: I think this kind of performance is truly worth promoting to the whole world — it is so captivating!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我很高兴你喜欢！下次有机会，我带你去博物馆看看关于京剧的历史文物。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hěn gāo xìng nǐ xǐ huan! Xià cì yǒu jī huì, wǒ dài nǐ qù bó wù guǎn kàn kan guān yú Jīng jù de lì shǐ wén wù.
lines.english: I'm so glad you enjoy it! Next time there's a chance, I'll take you to the museum to see Peking Opera's historical artefacts.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了，我一定要好好了解这份宝贵的文化遗产！
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, wǒ yí dìng yào hǎo hǎo liǎo jiě zhè fèn bǎo guì de wén huà yí chǎn!
lines.english: Wonderful! I will definitely learn more about this precious cultural heritage!
